name: 22q11_21_duplication_LCR22_A_D
description: 22q11.21 microduplication syndrome — reciprocal duplication of the canonical DiGeorge 3 Mb LCR22A-D region. Mediated by NAHR between the same LCR22 SD blocks (A, B, C, D) of >97% identity. Highly variable phenotype from asymptomatic to severe ID, behavioural problems, cardiac defects, growth retardation, hypotonia. Lower penetrance than the deletion.

architecture.internal_structure: Same four LCR22 SD blocks (A-D) of ~250-400 kb at >97% identity (GGT/PRODH/USP18/BCRP paralogs) as the deletion locus; unique core contains TBX1, COMT, CRKL, DGCR8, RTN4R, HIRA in three extra copies.
